case_title: RONALD E. JOHNSON VS. LINDA F. BAXTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, RONALD E. AS TO DEFENDANT BAXTER, LINDA F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RONALD E. AS TO DEFENDANT BAXTER, LINDA F.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RONALD E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAXTER, LINDA F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
